name: @panda-chat-widget/console

scripts.typecheck: sh -c 'if find src -type f \( -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.tsx" \) 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false; else echo "TODO: add console TypeScript sources"; fi'
scripts.lint: echo "TODO: lint command not implemented yet for protected console React app"
scripts.check: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build

description: Protected owner console shell for Panda chat widget.
